mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exams(student_id, start_time, status) VALUES(#{studentId}, NOW(), #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE exams SET status = 'finished', submit_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{examId}
mapper.select: SELECT eq.id AS detailId, eq.exam_id AS examId, eq.question_id AS questionId, q.content AS content, q.option_a AS optionA, q.option_b AS optionB, q.option_c AS optionC, q.option_d AS optionD, q.answer AS correctAnswer, eq.student_answer AS studentAnswer, CASE WHEN q.answer = eq.student_answer THEN 'correct' ELSE 'wrong' END AS result FROM exam_questions eq JOIN questions q ON eq.question_id = q.id WHERE eq.exam_id = #{examId} ORDER BY eq.id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_questions eq JOIN questions q ON eq.question_id = q.id WHERE eq.exam_id = #{examId} AND eq.student_answer = q.answer
